perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure recognizes Confidential Information to be any information or personal data that it receives from the Client in the process of tax preparation or planning .
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure recognizes Confidential Information to be only the personal data explicitly marked as confidential by the Client at the time of disclosure, excluding any information derived from tax preparation or planning.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by narrowing the definition of 'Confidential Information'. Originally, any information or personal data received during tax preparation or planning was considered confidential. The modified text limits this to only data explicitly marked as confidential, thereby contradicting the original broad definition. This introduces ambiguity regarding what information is protected and affects the enforceability of the entire agreement.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Obligations Regarding Confidential Information. Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement. Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client. Ross & Moncure shall process information and data provided in accordance with the instructions given by the Client and shall refr ain from recording, reproducing, or storing data for superfluous reasons. This prohibition affects both hard -copy data and data on any electronic, magn etic, analogue or digital medium . Under no circumstances may it disclose such data to third parties witho ut written authorization from the Client, even merely for safekeeping. Ross & Moncure recognizes that the duties of secrecy and non -disclosure continue to apply indefinitely even after all service engagements have terminated. Ross & Moncure undertakes to take and maintain the technical and organizational steps required to guarantee data security and prevent their alteration, loss and unauthorized processing or access, according to the security level required pursuant to the aforementioned legislation. T hese steps refer to the files, processing centers, premises, equipment, systems, programs and people involved in processing. Once the contractual service has been performed, Ross & Moncure agrees to hand back to the Client all of the raw data used in tax planning upon the Client’s written request. Ross & 726 North Washington Street | Alexandria, VA 22314 | Fax (703) 549- 6517 | Phone (703) 549- 5276 | www.rossmoncure.com | tax@rossmoncure.com
perturbation.justification: The changed text narrows the definition of 'Confidential Information' to only personal data explicitly marked as confidential and excludes information derived from tax preparation or planning. This directly contradicts the 'Contradicted Text', which states Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement. The change introduces an inconsistency regarding which information is protected and affects the enforceability of the agreement. This fits the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client.
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure may request any information from the Client deemed relevant to their services, irrespective of whether the information is strictly necessary.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by giving Ross & Moncure the ability to request information from the Client, whether if is strictly necessary or not, thus changing the obligation Ross & Moncure had of requesting only the necessary information.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Obligations Regarding Confidential Information. Ross & Moncure pledges not to disclose any information to which it has access in the process of the performance of a Client engagement. Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client. Ross & Moncure shall process information and data provided in accordance with the instructions given by the Client and shall refr ain from recording, reproducing, or storing data for superfluous reasons. Ross & 726 North Washington Street | Alexandria, VA 22314 | Fax (703) 549- 6517 | Phone (703) 549- 5276 | www.rossmoncure.com | tax@rossmoncure.com
perturbation.justification: The original text states that Ross & Moncure agrees to only request information necessary to carry out services, which is also stated in the contradicted text. The changed text modifies this by stating that Ross & Moncure may request any information deemed relevant, whether strictly necessary or not. This directly contradicts the original obligation, creating an inconsistency as Ross & Moncure is now allowed to request unnecessary information, conflicting with the 'only request necessary information' clause in the contradicted text. According to the definition of Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction this creates an in-text contradiction.

perturbation.original_text: Under no circumstances may it disclose such data to third parties witho ut written authorization from the Client, even merely for safekeeping.
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure may disclose such data to third-party affiliates for the purpose of improving service delivery, provided they have a confidentiality agreement in place.
perturbation.explanation: This change creates an in-text contradiction. The original text strictly prohibits disclosing data to third parties without written authorization, 'even merely for safekeeping'. The modified text permits disclosure to third-party affiliates for service delivery improvement, contradicting the initial absolute prohibition. This weakens the confidentiality protection.

This is directly contradicted by the changed text 'Ross & Moncure may disclose such data to third-party affiliates for the purpose of improving service delivery, provided they have a confidentiality agreement in place.' The original text prohibits disclosure, while the changed text permits it under certain conditions. This creates a clear in-text contradiction, fitting the definition of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure recognizes that the duties of secrecy and non -disclosure continue to apply indefinitely even after all service engagements have terminated.
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure's duties of secrecy and non-disclosure shall terminate three years after the completion of all service engagements.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction regarding the duration of the non-disclosure obligation. The original text states the obligation continues 'indefinitely,' while the modified text limits it to 'three years' after service completion. This directly contradicts the original agreement and creates ambiguity.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Obligations Regarding Confidential Information. Ross & Moncure also agrees to only request of the Client information necessary to carry out services requested by the Client. perturbation.justification: The original text states that the duties of secrecy and non-disclosure continue to apply 'indefinitely' even after all service engagements have terminated. The changed text modifies this to state that Ross & Moncure's duties of secrecy and non-disclosure shall terminate three years after the completion of all service engagements. This creates a direct contradiction with the original agreement, specifically within the contradicted text which also states that these duties apply 'indefinitely' after service engagements. This inconsistency falls under the 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction' perturbation type, as different sections now provide conflicting obligations regarding the duration of non-disclosure.

perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure shall bear the burden of any damages arising from negligence and/or lack of confidentiality, improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other infringeme nt of data protection rules. The full extent of these damages shall be determined by a court of competent jurisdiction.
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure's liability for damages arising from negligence or breach of confidentiality shall be limited to the fees paid by the Client for the specific services during which the breach occurred.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by limiting Ross & Moncure's liability for damages. The original text states Ross & Moncure bears the burden of damages, with the full extent determined by a court. The modified text caps the liability to the fees paid by the Client, directly contradicting the open-ended liability and court determination specified earlier.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Rights and Remedies Ross & Moncure shall notify the undersigned Client immediately upon discovery of any unauthorized use or disclosure of Confidential Information or any other breach of this Agreement by an employee of Ross & Moncure , and will cooperate with the Disclosing Party in every reasonable way to help the Disclosing Party to regain possession of the Confidential Information and prevent its further unauthorized use or disclosure. Ross & Moncure shall bear the burden of any damages arising from negligence and/or lack of confidentiality, improper use, processing or communication of personal data, or any other infringeme nt of data protection rules. The full extent of these damages shall be determined by a court of competent jurisdiction.
perturbation.justification: The changed text limits Ross & Moncure's liability for damages to the fees paid by the Client. The original text, repeated in the 'Contradicted Text', states Ross & Moncure bears the burden of damages, with the full extent determined by a court. This limitation directly contradicts the original text's open-ended liability and court determination. This is an instance of 'Inconsistencies - In Text Contradiction'.

perturbation.original_text: Ross & Moncure may not subcontract the provision of any services agreed herein in whole or in part.
perturbation.changed_text: Ross & Moncure may subcontract certain administrative tasks related to the provision of services, provided that such subcontractors are bound by confidentiality agreements.
perturbation.explanation: This change introduces an in-text contradiction by allowing Ross & Moncure to subcontract services, which the original text explicitly prohibits. While it limits subcontracting to 'administrative tasks' and requires confidentiality agreements, it still contradicts the absolute prohibition in the original clause.
perturbation.contradicted_text: Miscellaneous Ross & Moncure may not subcontract the provision of any services agreed herein in whole or in part. Ross & Moncure, Inc. Client: __________________________ 726 North Washington Street ________________________ Alexandria, VA 22314 _________________________ _________________________________ ____________________________________ Signature Signature C. Braxton Moncure, CEO; or, Client or Client Representative Steven W. Street, General Manager _________________________________ ____________________________________ Date Date ___________________________________ Title of Client Representative (if applicable)
perturbation.justification: The original text states that 'Ross & Moncure may not subcontract the provision of any services agreed herein in whole or in part.' The changed text modifies this to allow subcontracting of 'certain administrative tasks related to the provision of services'. This directly contradicts the original absolute prohibition, thus creating a strong in-text contradiction because the change now permits something that was previously forbidden. The contradicted text is the same clause as the original text which shows that the changed text introduced a contradiction with what was previously stated.
